_comment: Merge these scripts into your package.json

scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e

_doppler_variants._comment: Use these if project uses Doppler for credentials
_doppler_variants.test:e2e:local: doppler run --project {project} --config dev -- npm run test:e2e
_doppler_variants.test:coverage:local: doppler run --project {project} --config dev -- npm run test:coverage
_doppler_variants.test:all:local: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e:local
